cpuid 12288 0 - Live 0x0000000000000000
firstmalformed is a malformed_field
wireguard 114688 0 - Live 0x0000000000000000
secondmalformed controller should ignore this
curve25519_x86_64 36864 1 wireguard, Live 0x0000000000000000
